facebook.caption:
1,279 reviews. Every single one gives Vietnam Active 5 stars.

That's not luck. That's a PADI 5 Star center that actually delivers, every dive, every time.

First time underwater? Their instructors handle beginners without making you feel like one. Already certified? The reefs around Phu Quoc are waiting.

Find them on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, Cửa Lấp. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Gearing up at a 5-star dive center with 1,279 perfect reviews. Watch what the reefs around Phu Quoc actually look like below the surface.

instagram.caption:
1,279 reviews. 5.0 stars. Zero exceptions.

Vietnam Active on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is the dive center Phu Quoc keeps recommending. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: 5.0 stars across 1,279 dives. Phu Quoc's reefs hit different when you're actually in them.

tiktok.caption: 1,279 reviews. All 5 stars. This dive center does not miss. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocDiving #ScubaDiving #PADIDiving
